data.raceComments: {"comment":"13. YESGLENN did little and finished sixth over 1600m at Wyong last start after being prominent at the turn. Ran fourth at Nowra the run before. Tackling a more suitable race this time and is sure to be prominent with the cross-over nose band going on. 7. PASSING THROUGH is a six-start maiden ready to win. Finished fourth after being in contention on the corner at her latest appearance over 1000m at Canberra. Suited in this line up and is among the better hopes. 8. RAINING VIOLETS gripped on late for a respectable sixth over 1300m at Orange three weeks ago. Better than recent efforts suggest. Each-way. 2. THE GLEN is building up to a maiden win. In the money for the first time last start when third over 1100m at this track. Include.","runners":[13,7,8,2],"exclusive":false}
